verdicts.criticalReason: The PR commit (f7742a6) contains 0 file changes compared to its parent commit (a5016fb) and is completely empty. It has none of the required Campaign Routing Service or Spintax parser Java classes, nor any database schema migrations (V3) or tests, despite the commit message claiming they are implemented. This directly contradicts the PR's own stated Acceptance Criteria and Definition of Done.

concerns: The WebSocket endpoint uses setAllowedOrigins('*'), which permits connections from any origin and should be restricted to expected origins in production to prevent Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking (CSWSH).

WebSocket sessions are stored in an in-memory Set (ConcurrentHashMap), which works fine for a single instance but does not scale horizontally in a multi-instance production environment without an external message broker like Redis or RabbitMQ.
